detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DEER.openTrading() (DEER.sol#595-613):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (DEER.sol#599)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (DEER.sol#609)
	DEER.tradingOpen (DEER.sol#303) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DEER.openTrading() (DEER.sol#595-613)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [DEER.openTrading()](DEER.sol#L595-L613):
	External calls:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](DEER.sol#L599)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](DEER.sol#L609)
	[DEER.tradingOpen](DEER.sol#L303) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [DEER.openTrading()](DEER.sol#L595-L613)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DEER._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DEER.sol#461-525):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DEER.sol#507)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DEER.sol#539-551)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DEER.sol#513)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (DEER.sol#589)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (DEER.sol#523)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DEER.sol#683)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DEER.sol#663)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DEER.sol#665)
	DEER._rOwned (DEER.sol#263) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DEER._takeTeam(uint256) (DEER.sol#677-685)
	- DEER._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DEER.sol#659-673)
	- DEER.balanceOf(address) (DEER.sol#379-383)
	- DEER.constructor() (DEER.sol#329-343)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (DEER.sol#523)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DEER.sol#691)
	DEER._rTotal (DEER.sol#279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DEER._getCurrentSupply() (DEER.sol#783-793)
	- DEER._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DEER.sol#689-695)
	- DEER.constructor() (DEER.sol#329-343)
	- DEER.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DEER.sol#435-443)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.7 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.7 (DEER.sol#45)
